raw_consumer_statement: I purchased XXXX XXXX chargers from XXXX on XX/XX/year> which they were unable to deliver, so I requested a refund. A month later no refund so I called XXXX, and they said it was on its way, week later no refund. so, I filed a dispute with Citi card, XXXX then requested I cancel the dispute to receive my refund which I did. Still no money awarded, called XXXX again and they said they refunded the money because I won the dispute. Now Citi card is saying thou I won the disputed but canceled during the transaction I'm no longer intitled to the XXXX monies. The problem I'm having is why should I not receive the monies awarded to me XXXX sent the money to Citi card, but they will not refund the monies to my account, because I canceled the dispute. Now I'm out these monies and nothing to show for it as well as interest that Citi card is gaining
